common.slow_down: ⏳ **Slow down!** You are doing that too fast. Wait {seconds}s.
common.interaction_error: There was an error while executing this command!
common.no_permission: ⛔ You do not have permission to do this.

intro.submit_success: ✅ **Thank you!** Your introduction has been submitted for review!
intro.submit_error: ❌ An error occurred while posting your introduction.
intro.session_expired: ❌ Session expired or invalid. Please start over.
intro.inappropriate:
⚠️ **Inappropriate Content Detected**
Please ensure your introduction is friendly and free of bad words, spam, or invites.
intro.invalid_age: ❌ Invalid Age! You must be between 13 and 99 years old.
intro.already_submitted: ✅ You have already submitted an introduction!

moderation.dm_approved_title: 🎉 You're In! Welcome to the Community!
moderation.dm_approved_desc:
Great news! Your introduction in **{guild}** has been approved! 🌟

You now have full access to the server. Go say hi! 👋
moderation.dm_rejected_desc:
Hi there! Moderators have reviewed your introduction in **{guild}**, and unfortunately, it was declined.

Don't worry! You can try again anytime by clicking the "Submit Introduction" button in the channel. Please ensure you follow the server guidelines.

help.title: 🤖 Bot Commands
help.desc: Here is a detailed list of available commands:

setup.prompt_desc:
We are so excited to get to know you! 👋

Click the **Submit Introduction** button below to share a bit about yourself with the community.

Your intro will be reviewed by our lovely moderators and then posted for everyone to say, "Hi!" ❤️
setup.prompt_footer: We can't wait to meet you! 🚀
